name: San Diego Low Cost Bankruptcy Center
description_short: San Diego bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings with over 35 years of experience. Offers low-cost attorney fees, remote consultations, and virtual filing with no office visits required.
description_long:
San Diego Low Cost Bankruptcy Center, operated by Schreiber Law Firm, is a bankruptcy filing service led by attorney Jeffrey Schreiber. The firm has been operating for over 35 years and reports having filed more than 3,000 bankruptcy cases. Schreiber is also a certified tax litigator and has taught bankruptcy courses at the University of San Diego paralegal program for 10 years, indicating substantial legal credentials and experience in the field.

The firm offers Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing services with an emphasis on affordability and convenience. Their service model allows clients to complete the entire bankruptcy process remotely—including consultations via phone or video, document submission electronically, and petition review online—without visiting an office or attending court in person. They advertise $0 down payment options with payment plans based on ability to qualify, and claim to charge significantly lower attorney fees than competing firms. Specific services include initial consultations, petition preparation, tax issue resolution, and virtual court filing.

Key differentiators highlighted on their website include personalized one-on-one service directly from Jeffrey Schreiber (rather than delegation to junior staff), rapid petition completion (typically a few days, emergency turnaround in hours), and integrated tax litigation expertise to resolve federal and state tax issues. The firm provides debt elimination assistance, foreclosure prevention, stop wage garnishment, creditor harassment cessation, and mortgage/loan restructuring. Client testimonials emphasize Schreiber's patience, professionalism, preparedness, and compassionate approach.

A notable limitation is an apparent content inconsistency: the website prominently features messaging about an "Atlanta Low Cost Bankruptcy Center" and Atlanta attorney Jack Sisson alongside San Diego information, suggesting either template reuse or organizational confusion. The firm operates with offices listed in Chicago and San Diego/El Cajon. While the credentials and client testimonials are positive, prospective clients should clarify the firm's actual operational structure and whether remote representation is permitted in their jurisdiction.
address: 4275 Executive Square Suite 200, La Jolla, CA 92037

company_info.headquarters: 4275 Executive Square Suite 200, La Jolla, CA 92037

pros: Attorney has 35+ years legal experience and certified tax litigator credentials, addressing both bankruptcy and tax resolution
No office or court visit required—entire process completed remotely via phone, video, email, and online document signing
$0 down payment options available with flexible payment plans based on ability to qualify
Rapid petition preparation—typically completed in a few days, with emergency same-day or next-day availability
Direct service from Jeffrey Schreiber personally, not delegation to junior associates or supervised staff
Free initial phone or video consultation with no pressure sales approach
Comprehensive services including foreclosure prevention, wage garnishment stops, creditor harassment cessation, and debt elimination
cons: Website contains confusing content about an 'Atlanta Low Cost Bankruptcy Center' and Jack Sisson alongside San Diego information, suggesting template issues or unclear organizational structure
No specific fee amounts published; prospective clients must complete consultation to learn actual cost despite 'low cost' branding
Remote representation legality and availability not explicitly confirmed for all jurisdictions or bankruptcy types
Limited transparency about payment plan approval criteria ('based on ability to qualify' is vague)
Client testimonials are anecdotal and cannot verify authenticity or representativeness of typical client experience
best_for: San Diego-area residents seeking Chapter 7 or 13 bankruptcy with minimal time commitment and remote convenience
Individuals with unresolved state or federal tax issues needing integrated bankruptcy and tax litigator expertise
Borrowers facing foreclosure, wage garnishment, or creditor harassment seeking immediate intervention and debt restructuring
Budget-conscious filers wanting personalized attorney service without large firm overhead and junior staff delegation
diagnosis: San Diego Low Cost Bankruptcy Center is best for San Diego-area consumers needing Chapter 7 or 13 bankruptcy representation who prefer remote service, value personalized attorney attention, and have tax complications requiring specialized expertise. The primary caveat is website clarity issues regarding operational structure and the legitimacy of remote representation claims that should be independently verified before engagement.
services: Free initial phone or video bankruptcy consultations
Virtual online petition review and e-signature
Virtual court filing with no in-person court appearance required
Federal and state tax issue resolution and litigation
Creditor harassment and collection call stopping
Mortgage and loan restructuring and elimination
